name: acp-devtools-monorepo
description: Visual debugger / inspector for the Agent Client Protocol (ACP)
author: Roman Ponomarev <maksugr@gmail.com> (https://github.com/maksugr)

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core && npm --workspace acp-devtools run build
scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm run build:ui && npm --workspace acp-devtools run embed-ui
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core && tsc --noEmit --project packages/cli && tsc --noEmit --project packages/ui
scripts.dev:proxy: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js proxy
scripts.dev:replay: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js replay
scripts.dev:fixture: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js replay fixtures/fixture.db --ws-port 3737
scripts.fixture:generate: npm run build && rimraf fixtures/fixture.db && node packages/cli/dist/index.js proxy --no-ws --save-to fixtures/fixture.db --session-name mock-fixture node fixtures/mock-agent.js < fixtures/sample-session.jsonl
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
